articles.title: US strikes Iran after attack on cargo ship - BBC
articles.description: Iran accuses the US of violating their deal and says it struck targets linked to American forces in response.
articles.content: However, Iran's chief negotiator, Mohammed Bagher Ghalibaf, told state-affiliated news outlets that "everyone should know that the administration of the Strait of Hormuz will never go back to the way… [+23 chars]
